static.your-generosity-makes-difference: Your generosity makes a difference every day.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Al Salam in Helsingborg is an Islamic association and mosque. A center for Muslims to turn to in all aspects of their lives, from prayer and jummah to marriage, knowledge, guidance in matters
about.version-description: Muslims should feel at home in the country, be able to practice and fully exercise their religion as Swedish Muslims.

sponsors.title: Our Sponsors
sponsors.description: Thank you to our generous sponsors who support Alsalam Mosque

activities.title: Our Values
activities.knowledge-description: Seeking knowledge is a central part of every Muslim's life journey – a path to understanding, faith, and development.
activities.community-description: We pray together, break our fast together, and share life in a warm and inclusive community that Islam encourages.
activities.prayer-description: The mosque is open for all five daily prayers – a place for spiritual presence and inner peace.

services.title: Services
services.marriage-description: The mosque offers the opportunity to enter into marriage according to Muslim tradition. The ceremony is performed in the mosque by our marriage officiant and imam. After the ceremony, a marriage certificate is issued which has only religious validity.
services.koran-arabic-school-description: Teaching in Arabic and Quran The mosque offers teaching in the Arabic language and the Quran for children from 6 years old and up. The teaching is open both to Arabic-speaking children and to children who do not have
services.prayer-times-description: We display and maintain daily prayer times on our website as well as in the mosque. Times are updated regularly according to the current calendar for the sun's position.
services.jumaa-description: The sermon is held in the mosque every Jummah (Friday) and begins at the time of Dhuhr prayer.
services.fatwa-description: If you need guidance on an Islamic legal matter (fiqh), you are welcome to contact us via email.
services.family-counseling-description: If you need help or guidance in a family matter or conflict, you can contact us via email.

company.title: Corporate Sponsorship
company.subtitle: Support our activities through corporate sponsorship
company.why-sponsor-description: By sponsoring Al-Salam Mosque, your company contributes to strengthening our community and supporting our important services. Your sponsorship helps us continue to offer valuable resources and programs for Muslims in the Helsingborg area.
company.honorary-membership-description: All corporate sponsors receive honorary membership in the Al-Salam association in recognition of their valuable support.
company.question: Do you have questions about our sponsorship packages?
company.contact_description: We are happy to help find the package that best suits your company.
company.benefit-1: Logo as sponsor on our website

donations.hero-title: Support Al-Salam Mosque with a gift that keeps serving
donations.hero-description: Every contribution supports prayer, education, and care for families in Helsingborg.
donations.hero-note: May Allah accept every gift and return it with lasting reward.
donations.logo-description: A place for worship, learning, and community care.

donations.swish-popup-alternative: Alternatively, you can scan the QR code below:

donations.card-modal-error-name: Please enter your name or choose anonymous donation.

donations.tax-donation-description: Support the mosque through your yearly tax-based contribution.

donationRedirect.page-title: Thank You - Al Salam Center Mosque
donationRedirect.title: Thank you for your donation
donationRedirect.description: Your gift helps sustain prayer, education, and community care at Al-Salam Center Mosque in Helsingborg.
donationRedirect.blessing: May Allah accept your charity and multiply its reward.
donationRedirect.status-success: Your donation has been successfully recorded. Thank you!
donationRedirect.status-fallback: Donation received. Thank you for your support.

school.popup-title: 📘 Important Before You Fill Out the Form
school.popup-term-1: The course starts at the beginning of September and continues until mid-June. Summer courses are then offered for students who want to continue.
school.popup-term-2: Classes are held once per week. Guardians choose either Saturday or Sunday. On Saturdays, classes start at 10:00. On Sundays, classes start at 11:00.
school.popup-term-3: Teaching lasts about two and a half hours and includes: first hour Arabic language, a 15-minute break where the student can have a light meal, and second hour Quran reading.
school.popup-term-4: One parent must be a member of Alsalam Mosque through the FIFS faith community.
school.popup-term-5: The course fee is 160 SEK per month for each student and is paid by direct debit to the mosque school account. The fee is paid for 12 months.
school.popup-term-6: Books and school materials are distributed after the student's level has been determined. The cost is 350 SEK and is paid once.
school.popup-term-7: Communication: Once student levels are determined, WhatsApp groups are created for each class. Teachers post homework, assignments, and important information there to follow up with parents.
school.popup-term-8: Students must attend regularly and should not be absent without a valid reason. Necessary absences must be reported in advance. Homework and assignments must be completed and followed up at home by guardians.
school.popup-term-9: Students should wear clothing suitable for the mosque, prayer, and weather conditions.
school.popup-term-10: Mutual respect must prevail in all matters: no insults, no violence, and no dangerous play. Cleanliness and order, both personal and general, must be maintained in the mosque and on the way there.
school.popup-term-11: Students should not bring valuables. If they do, it is at their own risk. The school is not responsible for lost or damaged items.

form.title: Registration Form
form.gdpr: * Your application and data are handled in accordance with GDPR. Your personal data will be deleted after 4 years.

validation.mobile-07: Mobile number must be 10 digits starting with 07
validation.personal-12-19-20: Personal number must be 12 digits and start with 19 or 20
